description: Opened mutexes that are related to the hash
name: vt-private-get-domain-report

outputs.description: Domain name Domain.VirusTotal.DownloadedHashes Hashes of files that were downloaded from this domain

outputs.description: Resolution date of IPs that resolved to this domain
outputs.name: Domain.VirusTotal.Resolutions.last_resolved
